content: Hyundai Motor India, IIT Madras, and the Tamil Nadu government have launched the Hyundai HTWO Innovation Centreâ€”a â‚¹100 crore [$11.9 million] green hydrogen R&D facility set to pioneer pilot-scale hydrogen systems in India.
